title: Chapter 77
content:
Chapter 77: He’s Back

Aisha’s trembling continued. She shook severely, her heart seeming to match the softness of her nude body.

As she trembled like that, moans escaped from her lips, her hands tightly gripping the bed.

She moved one last time, feeling the emotion spread completely through her, flooding her entirely before she finally collapsed onto the bed, breathing heavily.

As she trembled there, Denzel finally pulled out from her and right then, a system notification popped up.

[Ding!]

[Player’s HP has already been restored to 100%.]

’Good, good, good. I am free to go another round.’

Then his eyes drifted to the side, and he could see that it was really getting late through the setting sun.

’Ah, it’s late, and I’m not even aware of the schedule of the chief’

’He could come back at any time and interrupt us’

’Aisha didn’t order me to come here today, so that probably means its safe to say that I should leave before I’m discovered’

’I suppose this nasty bitch has had enough.’

He landed a spank on her fat ass.

"Do you like that?" he asked.

Aisha immediately, without wasting a moment, nodded.

"I love it, Master. I love you, Master."

"Good, very good."

He helped her up, taking off her bound from her legs as he finally lowered her down.

As she came up, she immediately dropped down onto her knees without hesitation. Her eyes were completely filled with happiness and joy as she stared at him.

’Yes, this bitch has been tamed’

’I don’t know how the chief walks around. What else does he have better to do than to fuck a bitch this sweet?’

He thought inwardly as he moved gently, rubbing at her jaw.

"You did well. You did very well, baby," he said, chuckling lightly.

After he said that, and without wasting a moment, Aisha opened her mouth. He slipped his finger inside, and immediately she began sucking on it.

He could feel the tightness and warmth of her slippery mouth. The same mouth he had previously filled with his release was now wrapped around his finger as she continued sucking on it, letting out soft moans.

"Good. Very good girl."

Then a thought crossed his mind.

’This chief’s sassy wife is now literally satisfied with just a taste of my finger in her mouth’

’Yes, this bitch is mine. She’s mine, and I’m sure of it.’

Right then, a system notification popped up at the side of his vision.

[Ding!]

[Player has completed Taboo.]

[Player has received +30 Taboo Points.]

Then another screen appeared, displaying his stats.

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 Years]

[Strength: 50]

[Agility: 40]

[Sense: 40]

[Vitality: 40]

[Stamina: 40]

[Mana: 15/15]

[Rank: D]

[Harem: 3]

[Taboo Points: 30]

[Titles Acquired: [The Motherfucker] [Marathon Man]]

Seeing this, Denzel sighed as he pulled his hand out of her mouth. He held her close and gave her a light kiss on the forehead.

Then he started getting ready to leave the room.

’I wouldn’t want the chief to find us here.’

Aisha, still trembling, looked up at him.

"I want to go with you. I could follow you home if you don’t mind. We could make up an excuse for the chief."

Denzel shook his head.

"No. I want you here’

"I want you here so that when I come back, when I come back, I won’t just show you a quick walk"

"I’ll show you that I can take you away and give you something much better."

He spoke to her, and her eyes immediately filled with tears, as though she was truly in love with him.

"Thank you. Thank you so much."

She smiled.

"Get dressed, baby," he muttered.

As she moved, she grabbed him softly and pressed her cheek against him, squeezing him tightly.

He lightly kissed her forehead again.

’Because next time I come here, this sex I had with you will be like child’s play compared to what will happen next.’

He stood up and, in a single motion, got dressed.

After putting on his clothes, he stepped out of the room, leaving Aisha still on the floor, trembling and covered in sweat.

All she could do was sit there, feeling the raw emotions of everything that had just happened between them.

As Denzel stepped out, he glanced around.

’It’s getting late’

’What excuse would I even give if I run into the chief right now?’

’Now all I have to do is get out of here as soon as possible, get home, get back to my meal, and get on with my life peacefully’

’All I want is to get past all of this quickly without anyone noticing.’

As he walked, juggling those thoughts in his mind, another thought crossed his head.

’Well, one thing is for sure.’

He turned toward his car, the system screen still floating by his side.

’I have three harem members now, so that takes out the possibility that Aisha was the newly added harem member from back then.’

’So if I was to guess who it was... well, honestly, I don’t even know’

’From everyone I’ve interacted with, I have no idea who the person could be.’

’So, does it have something to do with the memory that I feel like I’m missing?’

He thought silently as he continued walking.

Then, right as he got to the door, he shrugged.

’Oh well. Let’s allocate these points.’

***

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 Years]

[Strength: 50]

[Agility: 60]

[Sense: 50]

[Vitality: 40]

[Stamina: 40]

[Mana: 15/15]

[Rank: D]

[Harem: 3]

[Taboo Points: 0]

[Titles Acquired: [The Motherfucker] [Marathon Man]]

’I have to admit...’

’...that looks pretty nice.’

Denzel stared at the floating status screen for a moment, carefully looking over every detail.

A small smile tugged at the corner of his lips.

’Not only that, but I’ve gotten a pretty good upgrade in agility.’

His gaze lingered on the numbers.

’Maybe I should put more points into my senses next time.’

Immediately, the image of the mysterious woman flashed through his mind.

’That way, the next time that woman tries to get away from me, I won’t lose sight of her so easily.’

His eyes narrowed slightly.

’Then I can finally find out exactly what the hell is going on in this world... and why she had to hide from me back then.’

After a moment, he dismissed the thought with a shrug.

With that, Denzel reached for the door and pushed it open.

A cool breeze drifted in from outside.

’Well all I have to do now is get home, spend sometime with my MILFs, enjoy some peace and quiet, and—!’

"You!"

The single word echoed from behind him.

Denzel froze as a chill ran down his spine. Slowly, he turned around, caught completely off guard.

He had been absolutely certain that only he and Aisha were inside the house.

Yet standing several feet away was Patrick.

The man’s face was dark with fury.

His jaw was clenched so tightly that the muscles twitched beneath his skin.

His fists were balled at his sides, and his eyes burned with a murderous intensity that made the atmosphere instantly heavier.

For a brief second, neither of them moved.

Then Patrick took a step forward.

"What the fuck are you doing in my house?"

He thundered, his voice laced with obvious murderous intent.

— End of Chapter 77 —
